channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Iran announces closure of Strait of Hormuz following US strikes
item.description: Iranian officials say the Strait of Hormuz has been closed in response to US strikes.

item.title: FIFA boss tells critics to ‘relax’ over Somali referee deportation
item.description: FIFA boss tells critics to ‘relax’ over Somali referee deportation

item.title: Maasai women turn drought into income through fodder farming in Tanzania
item.description: As drought kills livestock, Maasai women are turning drought-resistant grass into animal feed and income.

item.title: Mexico braces for celebrations, protests as World Cup opens amid tensions
item.description: President Sheinbaum promises safe World Cup as host cities ramp up security after cartel violence scare and protests.

item.title: Iran war live: Tehran retaliates after US launches attacks across Iran
item.description: Tehran remains defiant amid US attacks, orders complete closure of Strait of Hormuz to all vessels.

item.title: Iran attacks Bahrain, Kuwait, closes Hormuz Strait after fresh US strikes
item.description: Iran claims drone strikes on bases in Bahrain and Kuwait, as US strikes Qeshm Island and ports along Hormuz.

item.title: Trump’s claim of escorting oil through Hormuz won’t ease crisis
item.description: Trump’s claim of escorting oil through Hormuz won’t ease crisis

item.title: Hegseth: Guantanamo Bay prisoners ‘should have been executed’
item.description: US Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth says the prisoners of the US at Guantanamo Bay ‘should have been executed’.

item.title: Trial begins for man accused of sparking Palisades Fire in California
item.description: Prosecutors say man deliberately started blaze that became one of the most destructive wildfires in Los Angeles history.

item.title: Canada introduces bill to ban social media for children under 16
item.description: The bill also aims to make AI chatbots safer by establishing a digital regulator to set safety standards.

item.title: Ronaldo misses big chances in Portugal’s World Cup warmup win over Nigeria
item.description: Portugal beat Nigeria 2-1 as Pedro Neto and Francisco Conceicao net, but Cristiano Ronaldo scuffs golden chances.

item.title: ‘Negotiate with bombs’: Hegseth defends second night of US strikes on Iran
item.description: US Central Command has described the attacks as a result of 'Iran’s unwarranted and continued aggression'.

item.title: Trump directs interim US intelligence chief Bill Pulte to downsize agency
item.description: Interim ODNI chief Bill Pulte has been slammed by Democrats as a Donald Trump loyalist with no intelligence background.

item.title: Israel kills 16 in Lebanon, UN to probe international law violations
item.description: UN investigators to arrive in Lebanon next week to assess potential violations of international law by all parties.

item.title: Hero’s welcome for Omar Artan after Somali’s World Cup dreams dashed
item.description: Referee Omar Artan was denied from the US, where he was set to become the first Somali to officiate at a FIFA World Cup.

item.title: Gwyneth Paltrow’s Israeli real estate ad goes viral
item.description: Gwyneth Paltrow sparked widespread outrage by becoming the face of an Israeli real estate project.

item.title: First image in months emerges of Dr. Hussam Abu Safia
item.description: The first image in months of Gaza doctor Hussam Abu Safia has been released.

item.title: ‘I love the inflation’ US President Trump dismisses price concerns
item.description: Trump said he ‘loves’ inflation as new data showed US consumer prices rose at their fastest pace in three years.

item.title: India summons US envoy over attack on ship carrying Indian sailors off Oman
item.description: Three Indian seafarers are missing after Oman rescues 21 others following a US attack on the Palau-flagged Settebello.

item.title: Israeli strike on a car kills two in Sidon, Lebanon
item.description: An Israeli strike on a vehicle in the southern Lebanese city of Sidon killed two people and sparked a fire.

item.title: Trump: “we’re working… to make sure the right people come in”
item.description: When asked about people’s ability to obtain visas to attend the World Cup, Trump said administration is working hard.

item.title: Bill Gates testifies in closed-door US House meeting over Epstein ties
item.description: In prepared remarks, Gates told the House Oversight Committee that meeting Epstein was a 'grave error in judgment'.

item.title: Why Lebanon remains caught up in the Israel-Iran conflict
item.description: The Israel-Iran ceasefire may be holding, but for many in Lebanon, the war continues.

item.title: Iran says it will ‘not hesitate’ to defend itself after latest clashes
item.description: Iran’s Foreign Ministry said overnight clashes in the Gulf between Tehran and Washington showed how Iran will respond.

item.title: After a Democrat standoff, Trump signs $70bn immigration enforcement bill
item.description: Immigrant advocates warn the funding bill offers few guardrails for ICE and CBP amid Trump's mass deportation campaign.
